phase_name: Taxonomy Seed v2 Default Switch Execution

Final approval.question: How should Phase 12 register final human approval?

Readiness revalidation.question: Before any real default switch in Phase 12, which gates must be re-run?
Readiness revalidation.answer: Full pre-switch revalidation: typecheck, tests, build, explicit v1/v2 temporary compiles, repeated deterministic v2 compile with cmp -s, hard/soft gates, alias policy, graph coverage, review queue distribution, protected diff, data/compiled/v2 absence before publication, and DEFAULT_PATHS still pointing to v1 before switch.

Expected diffs.question: Which expected diffs should be allowed in a future Phase 12 execution?
Expected diffs.answer: Minimal controlled diff set: allow Phase 12 approval/planning/validation docs, official data/compiled/v2 artifacts, src/cli/parse_args.ts only for approved DEFAULT_PATHS fields, docs/release notes/tracking, and tests only if clearly scoped to v2 default plus explicit v1 fallback. Protect v1 inputs, v2 inputs, descriptor_aliases.seed.json, data/compiled/v1, curation data inputs, and graphify-out unless separately planned.

DEFAULT_PATHS switch.question: How should the DEFAULT_PATHS switch be done?
DEFAULT_PATHS switch.answer: Atomic DEFAULT_PATHS switch after v2 publication: alter seedPath, relationsPath, accordsPath, outputDir and version together in src/cli/parse_args.ts, only after 12-FINAL-APPROVAL.md exists, full pre-switch revalidation passes, official data/compiled/v2 exists and validates, data/compiled/v1 remains intact, and rollback is documented/validatable. Partial switches are prohibited.
options_presented: Atomic DEFAULT_PATHS switch after v2 publication

Official v2 artifacts.question: How should Phase 12 create and validate official v2 artifacts?
Official v2 artifacts.answer: Publish from validated temporary v2 output: compile v2 in /tmp/opencode/taxonomy-phase12-switch/v2-candidate, repeat in /tmp/opencode/taxonomy-phase12-switch/v2-candidate-repeat, confirm determinism with cmp -s, then publish the same validated outputs to data/compiled/v2 and compare official artifacts back to temp output. Do not use old Phase 10 temp outputs and do not overwrite data/compiled/v1.
options_presented: Publish from validated temporary v2 output

Protected v1 baseline.question: How should Phase 12 protect the v1 baseline during and after promotion?
Protected v1 baseline.answer: Immutable v1 baseline: v1 inputs and data/compiled/v1 are protected/no-edit, remain baseline/archive and rollback anchor, and must be checked before/after publication, before/after DEFAULT_PATHS switch, and before phase closure. Explicit v1 validation compile uses temporary paths only. Any protected v1 diff is a hard blocker requiring human review.

Rollback execution.question: How should Phase 12 validate rollback?
Rollback execution.answer: Rollback dry-run in a temporary patch/branch/worktree: restore DEFAULT_PATHS to v1, validate v1 inputs and data/compiled/v1 are preserved, run explicit v1 compile in a temporary output path and relevant tests/typecheck/build, keep data/compiled/v2 as versioned artifact but not default, and report rollback_success true/false. Git revert may assist but is not sufficient alone.

Docs and release notes.question: Which docs/release notes should be updated in Phase 12?
Docs and release notes.answer: Minimal release docs: update GSD tracking and Phase 12 validation/release docs, update README/CLI docs only if they exist and mention impacted defaults/usage, and create release/migration notes that state v2 is default, data/compiled/v2 is official, data/compiled/v1 remains baseline/archive, v1 inputs are preserved, rollback is validated, and accepted Phase 11 soft findings remain documented rather than falsely resolved.

Validation gates.question: Which validation gates should be mandatory in Phase 12?
Validation gates.answer: Full staged validation gates: separate hard gates for final approval, pre-switch revalidation, official v2 artifact publication, DEFAULT_PATHS switch, post-switch validation, rollback dry-run and final release documentation. Any hard gate failure blocks the next stage; data/compiled/v2 only after Gate 1; DEFAULT_PATHS only after Gate 2; phase closure only after rollback_success true and correct release docs.

Commit strategy.question: Which commit strategy should be used in Phase 12?
Commit strategy.answer: Staged commit sequence by gate/stage: approval + pre-switch validation docs, official v2 artifact publication, DEFAULT_PATHS switch, docs/release notes, and post-switch/rollback validation closeout. Artifact publication and DEFAULT_PATHS switch must be separate commits; approval/prevalidation must precede mutation; each commit must pass relevant gates and protected diff checks; unrelated changes and graphify-out must not be included.
